177 _51A MOST_SVR_PN_RATE_ADMSN_CD (51a) Rate the Highest Level of Pain Reported by the Patient Within the Assessment Period: Admission CHAR 2 A rating indicating the highest level of pain reported by the patient within the assessment period regardless of whether taking pain medication at the time of admission.
